raw_input: My 14-year-old daughter has been using ChatGPT to help with her homework. I'm worried it's making her dependent on AI instead of learning. I found your pricing page in Google results but I'm not sure if this is what we need or if there's a better approach. What would you recommend for a parent concerned about this?

contact.name: Unknown Parent
contact.context: Likely landed on pricing from Google search for AI and student homework

expected_classification.context: Visitor is a parent researching AI impact on child education, not a business user

expected_routing.reason: lost visitor with genuine concern—provide empathetic redirection and resources, not dismissal
